artPrompt: The dramatic moment of a cursed bargain: a clawed hand presses a quill into a blank parchment that glows hot gold as a single drop of blood blooms across it, a leering clown shape and a many-toothed shadow looming witness in the firelit dark. Scattered coins glint below. Wide landscape, carnival red and hot gold washes bleeding into smoky black, ember sparks drifting. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Demonic I.O.U.
text:
Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You don't pay now. You pay later.
At the beginning of your next upkeep, the bill comes due: you lose 3 life and discard a card. The interest is steep. The interest is always steep.
flavorText: Signed in blood, witnessed by a clown, notarized by something with too many teeth.
